steps.t: Barkh manages the kitchens in the south-west wall of the cavern beneath Isengard. Your overseer wants you to report to the kitchens beneath Isengard f…
Piles of slop litter the floor of the kitchens beneath Isengard. Barkh has given you a rag and the unenviable task of cleaning up after the Uruk-hai.
The slop bucket is in the kitchens. Barkh wants you to squeeze out the rag you used to clean up the slop into the slop bucket in the kitchens.
Barkh is waiting to speak to you in the kitchens beneath Isengard.
There is still slop to be cleaned up in the kitchens beneath Isengard.
The slop bucket is in the kitchens. Barkh wants you to squeeze out the rag you used to clean up the slop into the slop bucket in the kitchens.
Barkh is in the kitchens beneath Isengard, waiting to speak to you.
Barkh wants you to get some slop from the slop bucket in the kitchens and bring it to the bucket in the dungeons. The entrance to the dungeons is in t…
One of the prisoners has tried to get your attention. You should talk to him.
